name: Paul O'Neill
abstract: Paul O'Neill (February 23, 1956 – April 5, 2017) was an American composer, lyricist, record producer, and guitarist. He was the producer of the progressive metal band Savatage, and the founder of Trans-Siberian Orchestra.

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Kinkel
about_quotes.evidence: I was one of the creators of that with — Paul O’Neill and Jon Oliva were the main people
about_quotes.doc_title: Bob Kinkel interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 31, 2012
